text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: A senior Iranian security official said Tehran is moving according to its own planning and target bank, and that a big surprise awaits the U.S. and Israel. The official added that the U.S. target bank is not accurate, while Trump has resorted to media threats after military failures, including the downing of multiple American aircraft. Iran is using asymmetric warfare to wear down the enemy, and the U.S. has already failed in its strategy of a clean, quick and easy attack. @wfwitness
